rawContent: {"stage":"review","insights":[{"kind":"gotcha","text":"Adding a required field to login() breaks auth for all pre-existing users lacking that field; handle missing values gracefully or migrate existing records first","scope":"auth"},{"kind":"lesson","text":"A password hash field requires a corresponding salt field in the same hook and collection; omitting salt makes verification impossible","scope":"auth"},{"kind":"convention","text":"Hidden fields in Payload should use both `hidden: true` and `access: { read: () => false }` to prevent accidental exposure via API","scope":"src/server/payload"},{"kind":"convention","text":"Colocate PBKDF2 hashing in a shared utility module rather than duplicating pbkdf2 calls across hooks and services","scope":"src/auth"},{"kind":"decision","text":"Use Payload's `beforeChange` hook to hash passwords at write time, keeping the plain-text password out of the request lifecycle entirely","scope":"src/auth"}]}
